sentences.arabic: كَانَ التَّاجِرُ يُسَافِرُ بَيْنَ الْمُدُنِ لِبَيْعِ بِضَاعَتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Trgovac je putovao između gradova radi prodaje robe.
sentences.translationEn: The merchant used to travel between cities to sell his goods.

sentences.translation: Nosio je robu na leđima mazgi.
sentences.translationEn: He carried the goods on the backs of mules.

sentences.translation: Prodavao je začine, tkanine i parfeme.
sentences.translationEn: He used to sell spices, fabrics, and perfumes.

sentences.arabic: عَادَ إِلَى بَيْتِهِ بَعْدَ أَسَابِيعَ مِنَ السَّفَرِ.
sentences.translation: Vratio se kući nakon sedmica putovanja.
sentences.translationEn: He returned home after weeks of travel.
